project_overview.mission: Build a local-first government contracting market intelligence MVP that helps a solo founder decide which agencies, opportunities, contracts, and prime contractors to prioritize over the next 12-24 months.

positioning.not_goal: Do not replicate GovWin, HigherGov, or enterprise market-intelligence platforms.
positioning.goal: Provide a focused, founder-operated decision tool for Navy, DoD, CDAO, AI, data, knowledge management, and digital transformation opportunities.

target_user.persona: Solo founder with DoD/Navy, Team Submarine, acquisition analytics, knowledge management, Power BI, SharePoint, data engineering, and AI implementation experience.
target_user.decision_question: Where should I spend limited business-development time?

mvp_principles.principle: Local-first: dashboard reads from DuckDB, not live APIs.
Modular data: sample data can be removed and replaced with API-derived data.
Configurable scoring: weights and keyword lists live in config files.
Founder workflow: include manual capture notes and target-list export.
Low cost: run locally on Windows, macOS, or Linux.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Codex can scaffold a working Streamlit app from this file series.
App runs locally using sample CSV data and DuckDB.
No API key is committed to GitHub.
Dashboard pages show agency spending, primes, recompetes, partners, and opportunities.
User can export target lists to CSV.
